title: Agronomy Journal
body: The Agronomy Journal is a peer-reviewed scientific journal published by Wiley on behalf of the American Society of Agronomy. It covers all aspects of soil science, crop science, agroclimatology, agronomic modeling, production agriculture, and software. The editor-in-chief is Silvia Pampana (Università di Pisa). According to the Journal Citation Reports, the journal has a 2024 impact factor of 2.0.
